content:
Could you please look at buffing the amount of counter Wanda generates?

For current dtides, bosses can have 1.4 million health and my Wanda (medium built) generates about 200 counter a turn at level 60.

It's going to be a really long battle. 

All the rest of her kit seems fine. But she creates very little counter in today's morimens. 

Thank you.
i second this i love wanda please make her more consistently viable
